title: Shinji is Gendos Penis
wikitext:
[]: Shinji is Gendo's Penis? Post by NAveryW » Mon Jul 20, 2009 10:51 pm Episode 15 of Neon Genesis Evangelion : Evangelion 2.0 : The composition was intentionally altered, most likely to remove the phallic imagery. Now I kind of wonder if it was an accident from the beginning and it was deliberately "fixed" for 2.0 due to such.

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon Jul 20, 2009 10:53 pm I'm voting for accident. The thread title made me burst into laughter by the way.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Jul 20, 2009 10:57 pm maybe (btw, congrats on another joke thread )

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:01 pm It looks like the gravestone is the penis. Maybe that's why they slimmed it down. Also [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YaIOnw_2ugk&feature=fvw[/url]

[]: Post by NAveryW » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:04 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Also [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YaIOnw_2ugk&feature=fvw[/url]

[]: Post by The Invincible Shinji » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:18 pm

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:43 pm In all seriousness, I'm guessing the ep15 stuff was meant to be an Oedipus Complex reference of sorts. Still, I'm glad they changed it, if that was the case.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:01 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm guessing the ep15 stuff was meant to be an Oedipus Complex reference of sorts.

[]: Post by catinajar » Tue Jul 21, 2009 8:10 am This is the best thread ever. Credit to whoever sighted this giant phallus first, although I'm with Sammaeloo, the gravestone is the penis. That sounds like the title of a Bauhaus record...

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Tue Jul 21, 2009 8:51 am I am so tired of penises. Btw, I don't think that the original even looked like a penis, or was a reference. But oh well...

[]: Post by Timstuff » Tue Jul 21, 2009 10:00 am LMAO, I never noticed that "error" in the original NGE before. I guess Gendo wants teh Yui so bad that even her grave stone gives him a chub.

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:03 pm Someone else noticed this! Ha

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:15 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Someone else noticed this! Ha

[]: Post by NAveryW » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:19 pm Yeah, it's mentioned on the commentary...

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:20 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: I am so tired of penises.

[]: Post by Axell » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:27 pm We should start betting on how many will turn up in 3.0

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:32 pm Axell wrote: We should start betting on how many will turn up in 3.0

[]: Post by CyberXIII » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:52 pm Dear gawd.... I, once again, question the collective sanity of this forum. But I never did notice that shadow...

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:07 pm SHADOW BONE. SHADOW BOOOOOONNNE.

[]: Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:48 pm I get the whole dong joke, but ... the gravestone in the TV version just looks really weird to me to begin with. It's like they animated it at a completely different perspective angle than everything else in the frame. idunno.
